reason: The tweet is a religious statement asking for forgiveness from God for known and unknown sins. It does not express support, praise, or encouragement for ISIS activities, violence, or ideology.
original_post: سُآِل آحَدُهُممً العآفِيًه ؟ قْآل آًن يَمُر اليْوم عليِك بِلاً ذنبً #آستغفِر الله مِن كُلِ ذًنبِ آعلَم ومِن كُل ذْنبٍ لاً آعلْم
